message:
feat: gate TUI behind optional feature flag + add walker cancellation token

TUI feature gating:
- Make ftui/ftui-backend/ftui-tty dependencies optional behind "tui" feature
- Gate `pub mod tui` and `run_new_dashboard_runtime` behind cfg(feature = "tui")
- Add stub fallback for run_new_dashboard_runtime when TUI is disabled
- TUI remains in default features so existing builds are unaffected

Walker cancellation token (fixes thread leak):
- Add shared AtomicBool cancel flag to DirectoryWalker
- Expose cancel_token() for the scanner to signal cancellation
- Walker threads check cancel flag before processing and on recv timeout
- Replace blocking channel send with send_timeout + cancel check loop
- Scanner sets cancel flag when scan budget or deadline is reached
- Prevents walker threads from blocking indefinitely on full work channels
  when the scanner has already moved on to dispatching partial results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,10 +18,11 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 required-features = ["cli"]
 
 [features]
-default = ["cli", "daemon", "sqlite"]
+default = ["cli", "daemon", "sqlite", "tui"]
 cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:clap_complete", "dep:colored", "dep:crossterm", "sqlite", "daemon"]
 daemon = ["dep:signal-hook"]
 sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
+tui = ["dep:ftui", "dep:ftui-backend", "dep:ftui-tty"]
 
 [dependencies]
 # CLI (optional — gated behind "cli" feature)
@@ -37,10 +38,10 @@ toml = "0.8"
 rusqlite = { version = "0.33", features = ["bundled", "functions"], optional = true }
 # Error handling (core)
 thiserror = "2.0"
-# TUI (always included)
-ftui = { version = "0.2.1", default-features = false }
-ftui-backend = "0.2.1"
-ftui-tty = "0.2.1"
+# TUI (optional — gated behind "tui" feature)
+ftui = { version = "0.2.1", default-features = false, optional = true }
+ftui-backend = { version = "0.2.1", optional = true }
+ftui-tty = { version = "0.2.1", optional = true }
 # Timestamps (core)
 chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["clock", "serde"] }
 # Concurrency (core — used by scanner walker, not just daemon)
